description: Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.

userStories.title: Add workspace member schema and audit log table
userStories.description: As a developer, I want database tables for workspace membership and audit logs so that access and changes can be stored.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log table exists for membership changes

userStories.title: Add backend actions for invites and access management
userStories.description: As a developer, I want backend actions for inviting, changing roles, and revoking access so that UI can trigger them.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend supports inviting members by email
Backend logs changes to audit log

userStories.title: Invite members UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite members by email so that they can access the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: UI has an invite member form
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Change member roles UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member's role so that I can control their permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: UI allows changing role between viewer, editor, and admin
Role change is saved to backend
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke access so that former members cannot enter the workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: View membership audit log UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes so that I can monitor access.
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace settings page shows audit log of membership changes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
